name: Silver Tone Crystal and Heart Bangle
description: Elevate your wristwear with this sleek silver-tone bangle bracelet. Featuring a polished finish adorned with alternating clear crystals and delicate hollow heart motifs. Designed with an anti-tarnish coating for enduring, everyday elegance.

media.alt_text: Sleek silver tone bangle bracelet featuring clear crystals and heart cutouts

faqs.question: Is this bangle easy to put on?
faqs.answer: Yes, it features a smooth, structured design that slides comfortably over the wrist.

faqs.question: Will the silver finish fade or scratch easily?
faqs.answer: This bangle is treated with an anti-tarnish finish to resist fading and maintain its brilliant silver-tone polish with regular use.

meta_title: Silver Tone Crystal & Heart Bangle | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the elegant Silver Tone Crystal and Heart Bangle. Featuring alternating sparkling stones and heart cutouts with a lasting anti-tarnish finish.
